ideas.reason: Adds a missing read-only owner surface for explicit posture classification before live stage advance.
Closes a real precondition-read window by moving stage-advance preconditions under serialized owner lock.
Changes current exact-count reserve canon into minimum-depth semantics and affects proof/postflight behavior.
Patch does not apply to current HEAD and must be ported manually.

verification_contract.note: Targeted rollout tests must not be reported as equivalent to full merge readiness.

required_next_steps: Implement rollout posture inspect in a dedicated PR.
Move stage-advance precondition reads under serialized lock in a dedicated PR.
Write an ADR for reserve semantics before any behavior change.
